otherRequirements: Submit an SG Arrival Card before arrival
Passport must be valid for at least 6 months after the date you arrive
Length of stay (typically 30 to 90 days) is at the discretion of the immigration officer
sourceNote: gov.uk Singapore travel advice — visa-free for tourism/business, normally 30 to 90 days (https://www.gov.uk/foreign-travel-advice/singapore/entry-requirements)
